creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
My ISP is unfortunately no longer servicing my area, so I need to switch to a different personal email and website.

This will require two changes in multiple ports.

1) Replace jwbacon@tds.net with bacon4000@gmail.com in each of the following:

audio/praat/Makefile
biology/bwa/Makefile
biology/cd-hit/Makefile
biology/cdbfasta/Makefile
biology/fastool/Makefile
biology/fasttree/Makefile
biology/fastx-toolkit/Makefile
biology/gmap/Makefile
biology/hmmer/Makefile
biology/libgtextutils/Makefile
biology/ncbi-blast+/Makefile
biology/plink/Makefile
biology/plinkseq/Makefile
comms/cutecom/Makefile
devel/libgamepad/Makefile
devel/libnxt/Makefile
devel/libsysinfo/Makefile
devel/linux-c6-ncurses-base/Makefile
devel/linux-f10-devtools/Makefile
devel/linux-f10-ncurses-base/Makefile
devel/lnphost/Makefile
devel/openvex/Makefile
devel/p5-Device-USB/Makefile
devel/papp/Makefile
devel/py-instant/Makefile
devel/roboctl/Makefile
devel/swig20/Makefile

sysutils/desktop-installer/Makefile

sysutils/ganglia-monitor-core/Makefile
sysutils/mcweject/Makefile
sysutils/slurm-wlm/Makefile
textproc/xml-format/Makefile
www/webbrowser/Makefile


2) Remove http://personalpages.tds.net/~jwbacon/Ports/distfiles/ from MASTER_SITES in each of the following:

biology/cdbfasta/Makefile
comms/cutecom/Makefile
devel/libgamepad/Makefile
devel/libnxt/Makefile
devel/openvex/Makefile
devel/p5-Device-USB/Makefile
devel/papp/Makefile
devel/roboctl/Makefile
math/matlab-installer/Makefile
ports-mgmt/genplist/Makefile
science/afni/Makefile
sysutils/auto-admin/Makefile
sysutils/desktop-installer/Makefile
sysutils/diskimage-tools/Makefile
sysutils/endian/Makefile
sysutils/mcweject/Makefile
textproc/xml-format/Makefile
www/webbrowser/Makefile

All of these have an alternate master site already.

Thanks.
